textPlain: Sad to hear.Berlin is a modern typography hub, the influence Spiekermann has in the DACH region and maybe even beyond is hard to overestimate.Apart from that if you come to Berlin and you are the kind of person that would have liked the Buchstabenmuseum you should try to get an opportunity to visit the crashed space station.https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/C-base
Berlin is an open air museum for typography
Probably the money gambled away on slop AI startups in a single week could sustain thousands of museums like this for decades

The Museum Der Dinge is also worth a visit:
https://museumderdinge.org/
You could just have posted a Wikipedia link instead of AI slop ;)
